hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage":"Compass: context is about to compact. If a Compass build is active, pause at the current clean step boundary — update .claude/builds/<slug>/progress.md (stage, status, first unchecked plan.md step, open ledger items) and print the Compass resume block so the user can continue in a new terminal with /compass resume. Do not pause mid-write or mid-verify."}'
